global.object_description_chord_length: labeled points, a radius label, a chord, and an angle mark
global.object_description_tangent_radius: labeled center, tangent point, exterior point, a right-angle marker, and shown measurements
global.answer_hint_integer: set "answer" to the requested value as an integer
global.answer_hint_number: set "answer" to the requested chord length as a number rounded to one decimal place
global.answer_hint_tangent_radius_number: set "answer" to the requested length as a number rounded to one decimal place
